name: qa-yaml-ci-lab
description: A practical YAML quality gate for QA-oriented CI/CD examples.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md package.json .github .gitlab-ci.yml examples k8s schemas scripts test
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run validate && npm test
scripts.check:ci: npm run format:check && npm run validate -- --report reports/yaml-quality.json && npm test
